Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS HEALD COLLEGE, LLC, ED LUBIN AND MICHAEL HENDRICKS' Petition To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Or Dismiss The Civil Action IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
